introSection: Magic Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster currently owned and travelled by UK showman Abie Danter Jnr.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The Magic Mouse is a standard Spinning Coaster manufactured by Reverchon.

fullText:
Magic Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster currently owned and travelled by UK showman Abie Danter Jnr.

The Magic Mouse is a standard Spinning Coaster manufactured by Reverchon.



Magic Mouse in 2019.
